sentence: 农业机械化大大提高了生产效率。
pinyin: Nóngyè jīxièhuà dàdà tígāo le shēngchǎn xiàolǜ.
english: The mechanization of agriculture has greatly increased production efficiency.

sentence: 我的信用卡额度不够，付不了款。
pinyin: Wǒ de xìnyòngkǎ édù bùgòu, fù bu liǎo kuǎn.
english: My credit card limit isn't enough to make the payment.

sentence: 他把三分之一的工资存起来了。
pinyin: Tā bǎ sānfēnzhīyī de gōngzī cún qǐlái le.
english: He saved one third of his salary.

sentence: 这部电影讲的是黑帮之间的斗争。
pinyin: Zhè bù diànyǐng jiǎng de shì hēibāng zhījiān de dòuzhēng.
english: This film is about the conflict between criminal gangs.

meaning: 1. to enjoy (i.e. have the use or benefit of)
sentence: 大家围坐在一起享用丰盛的晚餐。
pinyin: Dàjiā wéi zuò zài yīqǐ xiǎngyòng fēngshèng de wǎncān.
english: Everyone sat together to enjoy a lavish dinner.
